title: Thiki Thiki Vandhu Lyrics - Nagaram song lyrics
stanzas:
Singers:  Ranjith, Megha
Movie :  Nagaram
Song   :   Thiki Thiki
Lyrics : Vairamuthu

Thiki Thiki vandhu nillamale
Adi vetkapattu nagam thinamale
Oru kattai-viral kolam podamale
Adi sattendru sonnai un kadhalai

Oru varthayil manne manne
pala vaakiyam sonnai
Un parvai ennai paithiyam seiyudhadi
Un varthai vandhu vaithiyam seiyudhadi

Edhiparkave illai illai
idhayam vazhi sendrai
Un aasai pechu nenjai killudhadi
En aanmai ippo naanam kolludhadi

[Nee sattendru sonnai kadhalai ennaku
Rekkai mulaithadhadi
Manam vinnai kadandhu vinmeenai kadandhu
Engo parakuthadi] (2)
Adiyaeee Adiyaee...

Chennai-yil parakum pattam ellam
Un peyar ezhudhatuma (2)
Nan central station gopuram eri
un peyar kovatuma
Karaigalai modhum azhaigalai azhaithu
kadhalai sollatuma
Un kaaladi akdandha manalgalai alli
Mootayil allatuma

Kadal niram marum, Udal niram marum
Kadhal anbu maradhama maradhama

Nee sattendru sonnai kadhalai ennaku
Rekkai mulaithadhadi
Manam vinnai kadandhu vinmeenai kadandhu
Engo parakuthadi

Paasam kaniyum paarvai ondre
Pavam thanikumadi(2)
Un koondhal malligai vesi erindhal
Koovam manakumadi
Yaaro ezhudhiya kavidhai sonnai
Jeevan innikumbadi
Naanum unnaku kavidhai solven
Eedu kodukkumbadi

Sugam peravendum, Oruvaram vendum
Naan manmadhan aagumbadi aagumbadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thiki Thiki Vandhu'?

The song conveys the emotions of love and affection, expressing how love can bring joy and excitement into one's life.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Nagaram'?

'Thiki Thiki Vandhu' is featured in a romantic sequence that highlights the blossoming relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Thiki Thiki Vandhu'?

The song is beautifully sung by Megha and Ranjith, whose voices complement each other perfectly.

Who composed the music for 'Thiki Thiki Vandhu'?

The music for this song was composed by Thaman S, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was 'Thiki Thiki Vandhu' released?

The song was released on September 10, 2010, as part of the movie 'Nagaram'.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Thiki Thiki Vandhu', the characters express their love and affection through playful and romantic lyrics. The song beautifully captures the essence of young love, filled with joy and excitement. With its melodious composition by Thaman S and heartfelt vocals by Megha and Ranjith, it evokes a sense of happiness and warmth. This track stands out as a celebration of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thiki Thiki Vandhu from the movie Nagaram is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love with its enchanting lyrics and melodious tunes. The collaboration between singers Megha and Ranjith, under the masterful composition of Thaman S, creates a vibrant atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song is sure to evoke feelings of joy and affection, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist.
stanzaMeanings: Coming here, the earth is still, The city is alive every day. Let's create a beautiful pattern with our fingers, Your love is what I call true.
In one word, you say many things, Your gaze drives me crazy. Your words bring healing to me.
There is no one to oppose, my heart is free. Your desires speak and touch my heart. My pride is now gone.
[You say your love is true, It has taken flight. My heart has crossed the sky and the stars. Where is it flying to?] (2) Oh my love, oh my love...

In Chennai, the songs that play, Will they write your name? (2) I will climb the tower at the central station, Will they call your name? Will they express love through tears and smiles? Will they bury the sands of your footsteps?
The color of the sea changes, The color of the body changes, But love and affection never fade away.
[You say your love is true, It has taken flight. My heart has crossed the sky and the stars. Where is it flying to?]

The bond of love is sweet, It is a blessing for the innocent. If your hair is like jasmine, It will attract everyone. Who has written this poem? Life is beautiful today, I will also write a poem for you, It will give you joy.
I want comfort, I need a companion, I want to become a lover, I want to become a lover.
